title: Forever Perfectly Simplified (FPS)
description: Pure optimization modpack with a few QoL additions with included Vanilla Tweaks texture pack, simplified to work out of the box.
body:
Pure optimization modpack with a few QoL additions with included Vanilla Tweaks texture pack. Specifically made to work Out Of The Box without any further configuration on **most** PCs.


Credits:
- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
- Every mod developer involved, links to specific mods found in Dependencies
- Special Thanks to fabulously optimized modpack, they did way better job at targeting the general audience and is the inspiration for this modpack.
